name: mc-infra
description: Infrastructure pipeline: hardware discovery, resource budgeting, PXE provisioning, and VM deployment for Minecraft Knowledge World

members.name: Infra Orchestrator
members.prompt: Orchestrate the infrastructure pipeline. Sequence stages from hardware discovery through VM deployment. Ensure each stage completes and produces valid artifacts before the next begins.

members.name: Infra Discoverer
members.prompt: Execute hardware discovery stage. Run discover-hardware.sh and discover-all.sh to produce hardware-profile.yaml and hardware-capabilities.yaml.

members.name: Infra Budgeter
members.prompt: Execute resource budgeting stage. Run calculate-budget.sh against hardware profile to produce resource-budget.yaml with VM allocations.

members.name: Infra Provisioner
members.prompt: Execute PXE/kickstart provisioning stage. Deploy PXE boot infrastructure and render kickstart templates for VM installation.

members.name: Infra Deployer
members.prompt: Execute VM deployment stage. Create VMs via vm-lifecycle.sh and deploy Minecraft server via deploy-minecraft.sh.

outputTo.description: Hardware profiles and capability YAML for platform adaptation
Deployed VM and server state for monitoring and backup

inputFrom.description: Distribution abstraction libraries for cross-platform provisioning scripts
